forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 description: Replace manual claimWhen predicates with automatic XY-coordinate spatial navigation in FocusScope. Each scope registers its DOM rect; nav commands find the nearest focusable item by geometry, scoped by layer.
-name: Spatial Focus Navigation
+name: Spatial Nav
 order: 2
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 description: Replace manual claimWhen predicates with automatic XY-coordinate spatial navigation in FocusScope. Each scope registers its DOM rect; nav commands find the nearest focusable item by geometry, scoped by layer.
-name: Spatial Nav
+name: Spatial Focus Navigation
 order: 2
